mapper.sql: id, pay_number, out_order_no, pay_channel, pay_scene, subject, trade_number, pay_amount, pay_bill_type, pay_bill_status, pay_time, create_time, edit_time, status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_pay_bill (pay_number, out_order_no, pay_channel, pay_scene, subject, trade_number, pay_amount, pay_bill_type, pay_bill_status, pay_time, create_time, edit_time, status) VALUES (#{payNumber}, #{outOrderNo}, #{payChannel}, #{payScene}, #{subject}, #{tradeNumber}, #{payAmount}, #{payBillType}, #{payBillStatus}, #{payTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM d_pay_bill WHERE out_order_no = #{outOrderNo} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE d_pay_bill SET pay_bill_status = #{paidStatus}, trade_number = #{tradeNumber}, pay_amount = #{payAmount}, pay_time = #{payTime}, edit_time = #{payTime} WHERE out_order_no = #{outOrderNo} AND status = 1
